query: SELECT item_id, name, category, use_effect, stackable FROM game_item_catalog WHERE item_id LIKE 'I_SCR%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT item_id, name, category, use_effect, stackable FROM game_item_catalog WHERE item_id LIKE 'I_SCR%';

rows.name: 武器強化卷軸
rows.use_effect: {"description": "武器強化卷軸（白武卷）：標準強化+1", "scrollType": "weapon_scroll", "type": "enhance_scroll"}

rows.name: 防具強化卷軸
rows.use_effect: {"description": "防具強化卷軸（白防卷）：標準強化+1", "scrollType": "armor_scroll", "type": "enhance_scroll"}

rows.name: 祝福的武器強化卷軸
rows.use_effect: {"description": "祝福的武器強化卷軸（黃武卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3", "scrollType": "blessed_weapon_scroll", "type": "enhance_scroll"}

rows.name: 祝福的防具強化卷軸
rows.use_effect: {"description": "祝福的防具強化卷軸（黃防卷）：爆裝率減半，成功+1~3", "scrollType": "blessed_armor_scroll", "type": "enhance_scroll"}
